description: Detects path traversal in JavaScript/TypeScript: path.join/resolve with dynamic args, fs.readFile/readFileSync with variables. Simplified from Rust: flags all member expression call_expressions (cannot filter to only path.join/path.resolve/fs.readFile or check if args are non-literal without #match? predicate support). All method calls flagged.

flag.message: Member expression call detected -- verify this is not a path operation (path.join, path.resolve, fs.readFile) with unvalidated user input
